programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
20/21. Baba has a swimming lesson with Oona. Diving proves difficult - but Baba is determined! Tha leasan snàimh aig baba còmhla ri Oona. Tha daibheadh na dhùbhlan - ach tha Baba daingeann!
21/21. When Baba isn't feeling well, Oona looks for his favourite things to make him feel better.
4/40. Putan Tuathal is Fuigheag's favourite game in the whole wide world. But Boban wants to work.
14/15. Eilidh visits Rose and her beautiful greyhound dogs, Libby and Marvin. We learn how to look after dogs and find out about all the activities they get up to together.
34/52. Tha fuaim taibhseil a' tighinn à frids AH-AH ach dè tha ga adhbharachadh? There's a ghostly noise coming from AH-AH's fridge, but what's causing it?
11/52. Tha dèideagan Pip rin sgioblachadh 's tha Posy 'son taic a thoirt dha. Pip's toys need to be sorted and Posy wants to help out.
12/52. Tha tubaist aig Uircean 's tha Pip a' cur plàstair air a gualainn goirt. Uircean has an accident and Pip puts a plaster on her sore shoulder.
24/80. Iain MacAonghais a' leughadh Air Cnoc Grad. Iain MacInnes reads Air Cnoc Grad.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 40/52. Tha Stella a' cluinntinn gusgal mu Mhgr. Bruno. Ach bheil e fìor? Stella hears gossip about Mgr Bruno. But is it true?
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 41/52. Tha'n Trùmpaid Rìoghail air a dhol air chall - càite am b'urrainn dhi a bhith? The royal trumpet has gone missing, where can it be?
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 41/52. Tha Troig 'son dearbhadh gum bi deagh bheachdan aige. Troig wants to prove that he has good ideas.
10/13. Tha muc-mhara bhruideil, gheal ri sàbhaladh - saoil an e am Mòbaidh Dick a th' innte? There's a huge, white whale to be saved - could it be Moby Dick?
4/5. Iagan MacNeil explores the Fife Coastal Path, from Elie to Crail. Tha Iagan MacNèill a'coiseachd cladach Fìobha, bho Ealaidh gu Caraile.
10/13. Calum Maclean visits an artistic and poetic railway tunnel in Colinton, Edinburgh.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
2/6. Peter goes to the Highland Cattle Show and takes a trip to the Western Isles. Tha Pàdruig a' dol gu Fèill a' Chruidh Gàidhealach 's air turas chun na h-Eileanan an Iar.

programmes.show_name: Trusadh - Air a' Mhachair /Life on the Machair
programmes.show_description: 2/10. Trusadh takes a tour of the Outer Hebrides to find out what life is like on the machair, visiting the communities that breathe life into this land.
5/6. Julie Fowlis agus Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh le taghadh ciùil bho Transatlantic Sessions. Julie Fowlis and Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh present highlights from Transatlantic Sessions.
4/4. Coinneach MacLeod explores the food traditions of Gotland in Sweden. Tha Coinneach MacLeòid a' faighinn blasad de chultar a' bhidhe ann an Gotland san t-Suain.
5/8. Calum McIlroy agus còmhlan-ciùil aig Duaisean nan Trads, 2024. Calum McIlroy and band recorded at the Trad Awards in 2024.
4/6. Coinneach MacFhraing seeks out unclimbed lines and challenging new routes on the remote and beautiful island of Rona.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
34/52. Tha fuaim taibhseil a' tighinn à frids AH-AH ach dè tha ga adhbharachadh? There's a ghostly noise coming from AH-AH's fridge, but what's causing it?
11/52. Tha dèideagan Pip rin sgioblachadh 's tha Posy 'son taic a thoirt dha. Pip's toys need to be sorted and Posy wants to help out.
12/52. Tha tubaist aig Uircean 's tha Pip a' cur plàstair air a gualainn goirt. Uircean has an accident and Pip puts a plaster on her sore shoulder.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 31/52. Abney and Teal go fishing. Teal soon loses interest, but Abney finally catches something very interesting - a handbag!
15/26. Tha gach seillean ri buiceil an-diugh. The bees are leaping today.
2/26. Ernest has lost a button on his accordion. Célestine is sure that it's been taken by the Green Mouse, a mysterious rodent that retrieves lost items.
25/80. Angela NicAoidh a' leughadh Air Mo Shlighe Dhan Amar. Angela Mackay reads Air Mo Shlighe Dhan Amar.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 47/52. Dave and his friends are locked in school overnight but find that they are not alone.
9/13. Carson a tha rùm Flòraidh na bhùrach?  Bheil gnothaich aig taibhs' ris? Why is Flòraidh's room in a mess? Does it have anything to do with a ghost?
Calum Dòmhnallach le taghadh de na faclan Gàidhlig a b' fheàrr a chòrd ris fhèin. Calum Macdonald introduces a selection of his favourite Gaelic words.
5/6. Tha Daisy a' feuchainn ri plèana leòmach a buannachadh agus cha stad i aig dad gus sin a dhèanamh. Daisy is busy trying to win a private jet and she will do anything to succeed.
3/6. We take an aerial journey along the Ayrshire coast and learn about the first Open Championship which took place at Prestwick.
10/13. Learner Maria Robertson from Aberdeen chats to Joy in the studio, and Calum Maclean dons his dancing shoes as he tries out Bhangra dancing in Edinburgh.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
5/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
2/3. Rain's effect on our culture - including a frog wedding in India. Buaidh an uisge air ar cultar - a' gabhail a-steach banais eadar dà losgann sna h-Innseachan.

3/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
1/20. Animated series. Some unexpected visitors descend from above for their first visit to Fraochy Bay.
1/6. Iain MacKinnon reads excerpts from Gliocas bhon Bhioball by Donald Saunders, and Mairi MacInnes narrates from The Mother's Catechism.
